_comment: Bricks Builder settings key registry. Maps every style-related settings key (prefix '_') to its CSS target, type, format, and logical group. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — consumed both by SchemaGenerator::is_valid_settings_key() for pipeline validation and by the AI-facing get_element_schemas response. Non-prefixed settings (text, tag, link, icon, image, etc.) are element-specific and discovered live via bricks:get_element_schemas.
_maintenance: When adding a key: set css (actual CSS property / 'internal' / 'data-attribute' / 'css-variable' / 'meta'), type, group (one of the keys in 'groups'), format (human-readable), and optionally 'since' (first Bricks version). Keep groups coherent.

groups.layout: Display + flex + grid container + individual child placement
groups.color: Foreground color (as top-level shortcut to typography.color)
groups.effects: Opacity, overflow, cursor, transition, filter, object-fit
groups.meta: Non-CSS settings — custom CSS block, class refs, interactions, HTML attributes, internal markers

_padding.format: Object with top/right/bottom/left keys, each a CSS length (e.g. {"top":"60px","right":"40px","bottom":"60px","left":"40px"})

_margin.format: Object with top/right/bottom/left keys, each a CSS length

_gap.format: CSS shorthand gap. Requires _display: flex/grid. On flex blocks the pipeline auto-converts to _columnGap (row) or _rowGap (column).

_columnGap.format: CSS length value for horizontal gap in flex/grid

_rowGap.format: CSS length value for vertical gap in flex/grid

_display.format: flex, inline-flex, grid, inline-grid, block, inline-block, inline, none. Layout elements (section/container/block) are flex by default.

_alignItems.format: flex-start, center, flex-end, stretch, baseline, start, end

_justifyContent.format: flex-start, center, flex-end, space-between, space-around, space-evenly, start, end

_alignContent.format: flex-start, center, flex-end, space-between, space-around, stretch. Only in multi-line flex / grid.

_justifyItems.format: start, center, end, stretch. Grid container.

_alignSelf.format: auto, flex-start, center, flex-end, stretch, start, end

_justifySelf.format: auto, start, center, end, stretch. Grid child.

_gridTemplateColumns.format: CSS grid template. Prefer var(--grid-N) (N=1..12) or repeat(N, 1fr).

_gridTemplateAreas.format: CSS grid-template-areas string (e.g. '"a a b" "c d d"')

_gridAutoFlow.format: row, column, dense, row dense, column dense

_order.format: Integer (negative values move earlier, positive later)

_widthMax.format: CSS length. NOTE: the key is _widthMax, NOT _maxWidth.

_widthMin.format: CSS length. NOTE: the key is _widthMin, NOT _minWidth.

_typography.format: Object with font-size, font-weight, color (raw/hex wrapped), line-height, text-align, letter-spacing, text-transform, font-family, text-decoration

_color.format: Color object {raw: 'var(--primary)'} or {hex: '#FFF'}. Top-level shortcut for typography.color.

_background.format: Object with color ({raw|hex}), image ({id,url,filename,size}), position, size, repeat, attachment, overlay ({color, image}). The 'unsplash:query' string in .image triggers pipeline sideload.

_gradient.format: Object with colors (array of {color:{raw|hex}, stop}), angle (e.g. '135deg'), applyTo ('background' or 'overlay')

_border.format: Object with width (per-side object top/right/bottom/left), style (string, not per-side), color ({raw|hex}), radius (per-side object top/right/bottom/left)

_transform.format: Object with function keys: translateX/Y (CSS length), rotateX/Y/Z (number, auto-appends 'deg'), skewX/Y (number, auto-appends 'deg'), scale3dX/Y/Z (unitless number, Bricks 2.3+), perspective (CSS length, always first in output, Bricks 2.3+)

_perspective.format: CSS perspective distance with unit (e.g. '800px'). Sets 3D context on a PARENT — children get 3D depth.

_motionElementParallax.format: true enables element parallax — emits data-brx-motion-parallax on the element for frontend JS. Not visible in builder preview.

_motionElementParallaxSpeedX.format: Horizontal parallax speed percentage. Sets --brx-motion-parallax-speed-x. Negative = opposite scroll direction. Requires _motionElementParallax: true.

_motionElementParallaxSpeedY.format: Vertical parallax speed percentage. Sets --brx-motion-parallax-speed-y. Requires _motionElementParallax: true.

_motionBackgroundParallax.format: true enables background-image parallax — emits data-brx-motion-parallax. Not visible in builder preview.

_motionBackgroundParallaxSpeed.format: Background parallax speed percentage. Sets --brx-motion-background-speed. Requires _motionBackgroundParallax: true.

_motionStartVisiblePercent.format: 0-100. Where parallax starts based on viewport scroll progress (0 = element entering viewport, 50 = near center).

_cursor.format: auto, default, pointer, grab, not-allowed, wait, help, crosshair, etc.

_transition.format: CSS transition value (e.g. 'transform 0.3s ease-out'). Prefer composing from --duration-* and --ease-* variables.

_objectFit.format: cover, contain, fill, none, scale-down (affects image/video)

_cssCustom.format: Custom CSS block. Use %root% as selector shorthand — it auto-resolves to the element's root selector. Do NOT use on text-basic/heading/button/icon/text/text-link (pipeline quarantines those to prevent frontend crashes).

_cssGlobalClasses.format: Array of global class IDs to apply to this element. Use global_class:list to get ID mapping.

_interactions.format: Array of interaction objects {id, trigger, action, target, ...}. See bricks:get_knowledge('animations') or bricks:get_interaction_schema.

_attributes.format: Array of {name, value} objects emitted as HTML attributes on the element root

_hidden.format: Internal marker object used by nested elements (tabs/accordion/slider) to target sub-parts via _cssClasses (tab-menu, tab-title, tab-content, tab-pane)
